# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: project-name
    type: google_project
    properties:
      name: project-name

  - name: cloud-sql-instance
    type: google_sql_database_instance
    properties:
      name: cloud-sql-instance
      database_version: MYSQL_8
      region: us-central1
      root_password: password
      enable_ipv4_only: true

  - name: cloud-storage-bucket
    type: google_storage_bucket
    properties:
      name: cloud-storage-bucket
      location: us-central1

  - name: compute-engine-instance
    type: google_compute_instance
    properties:
      name: compute-engine-instance
      machine_type: n1-standard-4
      zone: us-central1-a
      boot_disk:
        initialize_params:
          image: debian-11
      network_interface:
        network: default

  - name: load-balancer
    type: google_compute_forwarding_rule
    properties:
      name: load-balancer
      target_instance: compute-engine-instance
      port_range: 80
      ip_protocol: TCP
